command.text: select 'var f = this.get_element().parentForm; var $defaultTax = [f._defaultTaxCode, f._defaultTaxRate];if (f._action == ''New'' && !f._detailTax$VoucherCopy) setDefaultValue$DetailTax$Detail(this, $defaultTax);scatter$GridVoucherDetail$(this);' as message return

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select thue_suat from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue return end

if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @dvt nvarchar(32), @rate numeric(25, 5) select top 1 @dvt = dvt from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt select @rate = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') select rtrim(@dvt) as dvt, isnull(@rate, 1) as he_so return end if @ma_vt = '' begin select '' as dvt, 1 as he_so return end

if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') return end if @dvt <> '' begin select 1 as he_so return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt v on a.ma_vt = v.ma_vt where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @p char(6), @m varchar(64), @d varchar(64), @join varchar(512), @i int, @f0 varchar(1024), @f varchar(1024) declare @allocateKey varchar(128), @cFC varchar(32), @roundInvoice varchar(32), @tax numeric(16, 2), @taxFC numeric(16, 2), @promotionTax numeric(16, 2), @promotionTaxFC numeric(16, 2)
select @p = convert(char(6), @vcDate, 112), @f0 = @@textExternal, @f = '', @join = ''
create table #$r$0(t$ bit) select @q = 'select top 0 ' + replace(@f0, '''''', 'cast('''' as nvarchar(1024))') + ' from cthdtt a left join dmvt v on a.ma_vt = v.ma_vt', @i = object_id('tempdb..#$r$0') exec FastBusiness$App$Dynamic$AddColumn '#$r$0', @q alter table #$r$0 drop column t$ select @f = @f + case when @f = '' then '' else ',' end + case when a.name like 'ten_%' then '''''' else case when b.name like '%char%' then 'rtrim(a.' + a.name + ')' else 'a.' + a.name end end from tempdb.dbo.syscolumns a join systypes b on a.xtype = b.xtype where id = @i and b.name <> 'sysname'
if @vcCode = 'HDA' select @d = 'd81$' + @p, @m = 'm81$' + @p, @join = 'left join dmvt v on a.ma_vt = v.ma_vt', @f = replace(replace(@f, ',a.gia_nt,', ',a.gia_nt2,'), ',a.gia,', ',a.gia2,') else if @vcCode = 'PXC' select @d = 'd86$' + @p, @m = 'm86$' + @p, @join = 'left join dmvt v on a.ma_vt = v.ma_vt' else if @vcCode = 'HD1' select @d = 'd21$' + @p, @m = 'm21$' + @p else if @vcCode = 'HD2' select @d = 'd22$' + @p, @m = 'm22$' + @p else if @vcCode = 'PXD' select @d = 'd26$000000', @m = 'm26$000000' else if @vcCode = 'HD7' select @d = 'cthdtt', @m = 'hdtt', @join = 'left join dmvt v on a.ma_vt = v.ma_vt'
if @vcCode not in ('HDA', 'HD7') select @f = replace(@f, 'a.km_yn', '''0''') else begin if not exists(select 1 from syscolumns a where a.name = 'km_yn' and exists(select 1 from sysobjects b where a.id = b.id and b.name = 'd81$000000')) select @f = replace(@f, 'a.km_yn', '''0''') end &DetailTaxRITranRetrieve; if @vcCode in ('HD2', 'PXC', 'PXD') select @f = replace(replace(replace(@f, 'a.tl_ck', '0'), 'a.ck_nt', '0'), 'a.ck', '0') if @vcCode in ('HD1', 'HD2', 'PXD') select @f = replace(replace(@f, 'a.ma_vt', ''''''), 'a.he_so', 'case when a.dvt <> '''' then 1 else 0 end') if @vcCode in ('HDA', 'PXC') select @f = replace(@f, 'a.dien_giai', 'v.ten_vt%l') if @vcCode in ('PXC', 'PXD') select @f = replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(@f, 'a.tien_nt2', 'a.tien_nt'), 'a.tien2', 'a.tien'), 'a.ma_thue', 'b.ma_thue'), 'a.thue_suat', 't.thue_suat'), 'a.ma_kh2', 'b.ma_kh2'), @join = @join + ' left join ' + @m + ' b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec left join dmthue t on b.ma_thue = t.ma_thue'
select @q = 'insert into #$r$0 select ' + @f + ' from ' + @d + ' a ' + @join + ' where a.stt_rec = @vcID' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@vcID char(13)', @vcID select * from #$r$0 drop table #$r$0
